name: Internal Tools
description: Agent team for operational systems, admin workflows, and internal product delivery.
instructions: Optimize for reliability, permissions, and auditability.
Assume operational clarity matters more than marketing polish.

contextNotes: Use for admin portals, ops tooling, or service repos where correctness matters more than broad growth content.
Smart mode preserves existing tool-owned files while avoiding churn in adjacent operational code.
